title: CyberSecQwen-4B: Why Defensive Cyber Needs Small, Specialized, Locally-Runnable Models
summary: This content argues that defensive cybersecurity benefits from small, specialized, locally-run models like CyberSecQwen-4B, which offer privacy, low latency, and cost efficiency compared to large cloud-based LLMs. It highlights the practical advantages of domain-specific fine-tuning for threat detection and incident response.
